summary: Tested BNPL (Buy Now Pay Later) Button Integration and Merchant Dashboard Field Mapping. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). BNPL APIs working correctly - calculate and eligibility endpoints functional. Merchant Dashboard correctly displays products (title field) and coupons (code, discount, status fields). Frontend BNPL button implementation verified in code - shows only for authenticated users on packages >= €50.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ BNPL Button correctly shows only for isAuthenticated && pkg.price >= 50 (BuyBids.js line 496)
✓ BNPL Button has correct data-testid='bnpl-{pkg.id}' for testing
✓ BNPL Modal component properly handles eligibility check and plan selection
✓ BNPL Calculate API returns correct interest rates: 3 months (0%), 6 months (2.9%), 12 months (5.9%)
✓ BNPL Eligibility API correctly checks user credit score, open plans, and max amount
✓ Merchant Products display uses fallback: product.title || product.name (WholesaleDashboard.js line 1094)
✓ Merchant Products price uses fallback: product.market_value || product.retail_price (line 1098)
✓ Merchant Coupons display uses fallback for discount: discount_percent || discount_amount || discount_value (lines 1233-1239)
✓ Merchant Coupons status uses fallback: coupon.active !== false && coupon.is_active !== false (line 1228)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (verified via Playwright - Products and Coupons display correctly)

context_for_next_testing_agent: BNPL feature: Button appears on Buy Bids page for logged-in users on packages >= €50 (Pro €50, Ultimate €100). Test user kunde@bidblitz.ae has 2 open installment plans so is 'nicht berechtigt' (not eligible) - this is expected behavior. Merchant Dashboard at /b2b/dashboard - login via /b2b/login. Products tab shows title, category, price, status. Coupons tab shows code, discount, min purchase, usage count, status.

bnpl_button.status: PASS - Code verified, button renders conditionally

bnpl_modal.status: PASS - Modal opens and shows eligibility status

bnpl_apis./api/bnpl/eligibility: PASS - Returns eligible, reason, max_amount, credit_score, installment_options

merchant_products.field_mapping: title || name, market_value || retail_price, category, status
merchant_products.status: PASS - No 'undefined' text, products display correctly

merchant_coupons.field_mapping: code, discount_percent || discount_amount || discount_value, active || is_active
merchant_coupons.status: PASS - No 'undefined' text, coupons display correctly
